errors.computerIpRequired: At least one computer IP address is required.
errors.computerIpInvalid: Computer IP must be a valid IPv4 address.
errors.computerMacRequired: At least one computer MAC address is required.
errors.computerMacInvalid: Computer MAC must be a valid MAC address.
errors.sshPortInvalid: SSH port must be between 1 and 65535.
errors.sshUsernameRequired: SSH username is required for shutdown.
errors.sshPasswordRequired: SSH password is required for shutdown.
errors.wakeOnLanSendFailed: Failed to send the Wake-on-LAN packet.
errors.shutdownOverSshFailed: Failed to shut down the computer over SSH.

warnings.sshUnavailable: Computer is reachable, but SSH is unavailable.
